title: coreopsis tinctoria f. atropurpurea
intro: Coreopsis tinctoria f. atropurpurea, also known as the purple or red flowered coreopsis, is a variety of the coreopsis plant, a flowering perennial native to North America. The coreopsis tinctoria f. atropurpurea plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of the coreopsis tinctoria f. atropurpurea plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as a natural dye due to its high concentration of flavonoids and carotenoids. Coreopsis tinctoria f. atropurpurea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to soothe skin conditions and internally to promote digestive health.
